victim.value: A beautiful woman who died young after being abandoned by lovers
victim.quote: تلك الفتاة المسكينة ، انفجرت في البكاء

closed_world.value: Archaeological site with mosque library and ancient manuscripts

investigator.value: Archaeological team including supervisor and expert Miss Zeta examining manuscripts
investigator.quote: أنسه زيتا كل شيء جائز لأن هذا مكان اثري

suspect_architecture.value: Two main suspects: Ahmed (enraged by manuscript discovery, religious crisis) and Ali (archaeologist with specialized knowledge, discovers eight-pointed star anomaly). Supporting cast includes Miss Zeta (expert translator) and unnamed supervisor at archaeological site.
suspect_architecture.quote: كان احمد يصرخ بهذا الكلام وهو يذرع الغرفة جيئاً وذهاباً ، اما زميلة علي فكان جالساً يقلب تلك المخطوطات

red_herring.value: The eight-pointed star appearing across different religions (Islamic, Orthodox Christian, and ancient pagan manuscripts) - presented as shocking discovery that distracts from examining the dangerous manuscript content itself.
red_herring.quote: اليست هذه النجمة الثمانية الإسلامية ! ، ماذا تفعل هنا بحق السماء ؟

clue_fairness.value: Anachronistic dating system revealed - clay tablet mentions conflict between males and females, but uses Gregorian calendar instead of Islamic Hijri calendar expected for Muslim ruler's site.
clue_fairness.quote: لكن ايها المشرف في ذلك الوقت المسلمون كانوا يستعملون التاريخ الهجري وليس الميلادي

social_world.value: Archaeological expedition hierarchy with supervisor and expert translator Miss Zeta. Historical tribal power structure described with two powerful tribes controlling resources, farms, and weapon-making, leading to religious schism.
social_world.quote: كانا ينتميان الى اقوى واذكى قبيلتين في المنطقة ، حيث ان اغلب الموارد من مزارع وحقول وحيوانات كانت تحت سيطرتهم

reveal_mechanic.value: Archaeological evidence examination - manuscript analysis revealing anachronistic elements, dating inconsistencies, and cross-religious symbol contamination that shouldn't exist in authentic historical documents.

media_and_audience.value: Religious and academic institutional crisis - discovery threatens established religious narratives about divine origins, with characters fearing their prayers and sacrifices were directed toward pagan deity rather than heavenly God.
media_and_audience.quote: هل كنا طوال هذه السنوات في خدعة ، كل ذلك الدعاء وتلك والصلوات والقرابين ، كانت من اجل اله وثني

investigator_wound.value: Religious identity crisis - Ahmed's psychological breakdown stems from discovery that his lifelong faith may be built on deception, creating existential vulnerability that the investigation exploits.
investigator_wound.quote: كان غاضباً لدرجة الجنون ، نهض من كرسية و صرخ بصوت عالي
